The '''''Messenger''''' was a [[720 light freighter/Legends|Ghtroc 720 freighter]] owned by the [[Core Courier Service]]. It routinely delivered mail to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], [[Coriallis]], and other [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. In [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], it was crewed by [[Taryn Clancy]] and [[Del Sato]], who helped [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Jak Bremen]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggle]] an important [[Datacard/Legends|datacard]] off Coruscant during its [[Second Battle of Coruscant|bombardment]]. It was modified with a [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|backup shield generator]].

{{Ship-stub}}
